---
name: Documentation Request
about: Request improvements or updates to the documentation
title: "[DOC] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Documentation to Update

Specific file or section: (e.g. `README.md`, `docs/api.md`)

## Current Problem

Describe what is incomplete, outdated, or confusing in the current documentation.

## Proposed Improvement

What should be added or changed:

- [ ] Explanations or clarifications
- [ ] Code examples
- [ ] Step-by-step guides
- [ ] Diagrams or screenshots
- [ ] API references
- [ ] Other:

## Target Audience

- [ ] Developers
- [ ] End users
- [ ] System administrators
- [ ] Other:

## Additional Context

External references, examples from other documentation, or additional relevant details.
